description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic and aggressive design, with a predominantly black body accented by vivid green highlights and angular, segmented ribbing along the barrel. The barrel is elongated and tapers to a point, with green ridges running along its length, giving it a high-tech, almost organic appearance. The grip is textured with a geometric brown pattern, providing both visual contrast and ergonomic support. The receiver and trigger area are robust, with a visible trigger guard and a compact, pistol-style grip. The overall form is sleek and streamlined, with no visible stock and a single, solid barrel. The green accents and sharp contours suggest a weapon designed for both intimidation and advanced functionality in an urban environment.
description: A sleek, black shotgun with vivid green ribbing, a pistol grip, and a futuristic, segmented barrel design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black body, green ribbing along the barrel, and brown textured pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed, ribbed barrel and the symmetrical green accents.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same green and black color scheme, with clear visibility of the grip and trigger area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the grip and the alignment of the ribbed barrel segments.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with segmented ribbing and no visible venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible reinforcement
